intro_001.title: Welcome
intro_001.body: Ah, a new ruler to take care of the worlds. Ready to do it?

intro_002.title: The bars
intro_002.body: Each of your choices affects the bars at the top. Swipe this card to see how a single decision can change everything.

intro_003.title: The token
intro_003.body: Oops! The Balance bar is very low. Tap the token, then use the option that restores one bar to 50%. Then click the flashing bar.
